constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases will not exceed 10510^5105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: We will demonstrate a way to achieve a score of 222.

In the first minute, we will increase aaa by 111 so that a=1a=1a=1 and b=0b=0b=0. Since there is an event with type 111 and a>ba\gt ba>b our score increases by 111.
In the second minute, we will increase bbb by 111 so that a=1a=1a=1 and b=1b=1b=1. Since there is an event with type 222 and aaa is not less than bbb, our score remains 111 and the counters are reset.
In the third minute, we will increase aaa by 111 so that a=1a=1a=1 and b=0b=0b=0. There are no events in this minute.
In the fourth minute, we will increase aaa by 111 so that a=2a=2a=2 and b=0b=0b=0. There are no events in this minute.
In the fifth minute, we will increase aaa by 111 so that a=3a=3a=3 and b=0b=0b=0. Since there is an event with type 111 and a>ba\gt ba>b our score increases by 111.

Thus, the total score achieved is 222.
It can be shown that there is no possible way for our score to be greater than 222.
Test case 222: We will demonstrate a way to achieve a score of 555.

In the first minute, we will increase aaa by 111 so that a=1a=1a=1 and b=0b=0b=0. Since there is an event with type 111 and a>ba\gt ba>b our score increases by 111.
In the second minute, we will increase aaa by 111 so that a=2a=2a=2 and b=0b=0b=0. Since there is an event with type 111 and a>ba\gt ba>b our score increases by 111.
In the third minute, we will increase aaa by 111 so that a=3a=3a=3 and b=0b=0b=0. Since there is an event with type 111 and a>ba\gt ba>b our score increases by 111.
In the fourth minute, we will increase aaa by 111 so that a=4a=4a=4 and b=0b=0b=0. Since there is an event with type 111 and a>ba\gt ba>b our score increases by 111.
In the fifth minute, we will increase aaa by 111 so that a=5a=5a=5 and b=0b=0b=0. Since there is an event with type 111 and a>ba\gt ba>b our score increases by 111.

Thus, the total score achieved is 555.
It can be shown that there is no possible way for our score to be greater than 555.
